---
title: 'Balance'
date: '2012-10-02T03:20:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Call To Excellence'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1336935703224942386'
blogger_filename: '/2012/10/balance.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Call To Excellence/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Notes'
---

A Christian Nation created a government that persecuted non Christians in Rome... this is not the Love of God.<br />
<br />
A Christian Nation rolled over and played dead for evil men to take it over... this is not the LOVE of God either.<br />
<br />
<br />
A Christian Nation must rise up, to protect the ones it serves. To both allow those who would&nbsp;descent&nbsp;to&nbsp;descent&nbsp;&nbsp; while not allowing those who&nbsp;descent&nbsp;to take over the very nation that was created to protect them.
